calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Continued To May-15-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 502

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:

Benjamin Carnes, of Urban Craftsman Builders for plaintiff/respondent, with witnesses: Michael Cohen; Cyrus Mellows; and Amy Nicholson.
Ron Lester, of Iron Maverick, Inc., for defendant/appellant.

10:41 am - This cause comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

10:42 am - Benjamin Carnes, plaintiff/respondent, testifies on his own behalf. The following unmarked evidence is introduced:
- Copy of JPMorgan Chase Bank Check 1178 from Urban Craftsman Builders;
- email from Ron Lester to Benjamin Carnes, dated 10/20/15;
- email from Ron Lester to Benjamin Carnes, dated 4/04/16;
- email from Ron Lester to Benjamin Carnes, dated 6/28/16;
- email from Ron Lester to Benjamin Carnes, dated 3/30/16;
- Blueprint of work for Smith Residence.

10:46 am - Ron Lester testifies on behalf of Iron Maverick, Inc., for defendant/appellant. The following unmarked evidence is introduced:
- Copy of JPMorgan Chase Bank Check 1178 from Urban Craftsman Builders;
- Progress/Payment Schedule from Iron Maverick Inc.;
- Invoice from Iron Maverick Inc.;
- Proposal from Iron Maverick Inc.;
- Letter to Amy Nicholson from Ron Lester, dated 2/24/17;
- Revised Proposal #2 from Iron Maverick Inc.;
- Invoice Summary from Iron Maverick Inc.;
- Progress/Payment Schedule from Iron Maverick Inc.;
- Proposal from Iron Maverick Inc.;
- Revised Proposal Iron Maverick Inc.;
- Final Invoice from Iron Maverick Inc.;
- (2) - 8 1/2 x 11 Color-Printed Photographs.

11:00 am - Benjamin Carnes, plaintiff/respondent, submits further testimony.

11:03 am - Witness, Amy Nicholson testifies for plaintiff/respondent.

11:21 am - At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 502.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Continued To May-15-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-04-2017 Set For Trial On May-15-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 303

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-04-2017 Continued To May-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Judgment Entered
